name: Enboarder
tagline: AI-powered onboarding experience platform for new hire success
description: Enboarder is a people activation platform that uses AI and workflow automation to create exceptional onboarding experiences. It goes beyond checklists to orchestrate personalized journeys that connect new hires with their managers, buddies, and teams. Enboarder's AI-driven nudges ensure the right actions happen at the right time during preboarding, onboarding, and transitions.
